---
title: "Introduction to Python"
sidebar: false
toc: false
---


| Audience | Computational skills required| Duration |
:----------|:----------|:----------|
| Biologists | None | 4-session workshop (8 hours of trainer-led time)|

### Description

This repository has teaching materials for a hands-on workshop on **Introduction to Python**. 

Description of workshop. 

::: callout-note
# Note for trainers
Please note that the schedule linked below assumes that learners will spend between 3-5 hours on reading through and completing exercises from selected lessons between classes. The online component of the workshop focuses on more exercises and discussion/Q & A.
:::

### Learning Objectives

In this workshop, the participants will:

- Broad Learning Objective 1
- Broad Learning Objective 2
- Broad Learning Objective 3
- Broad Learning Objective 4

### Lessons
These materials were developed for a trainer-led workshop, but are also amenable to self-guided learning.

- [Workshop schedule (trainer-led learning)](schedule/schedule.qmd)
- [Self-learning](schedule/self-learning.qmd)


### Installation Requirements

Download the most recent version of the **Graphical Installer** of Anaconda for the appropriate operating system of your computer using the link below:

- [Anaconda](https://www.anaconda.com/download/success)

Once downloaded, run the installer and follow the prompts to complete the installation. Use the default settings, and make sure to add Anaconda to your PATH variable if prompted.
